text.title: voice-ui Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: scheduling + payment intent on custom-LLM voice agent.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Custom-LLM voice agent (Realtime API) for a personal-finance app. Two intents: schedule-appointment (non-irreversible), send-payment (irreversible).

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Realtime API wires the intents; QA passes accidental-pay test.
